Rule Definition: Each user account must have exactly one role: customer provider or administrator.
Customer registration requires a valid email password of at least 8 characters full name and phone number.
Provider registration requires a valid email password of at least 8 characters full name and business name.
Only authenticated users with a valid JWT access token may access protected API endpoints.
Suspended or inactive user accounts are blocked from accessing protected platform features.
Only verified and available providers appear in the customer provider browse list.
A transport order must include pickup address delivery address scheduled time and item or pricing details before creation.
Customers may cancel an order only while its status is pending matched or accepted and must provide a cancellation reason.
Providers may cancel an order only while its status is accepted picking up or in progress.
Completed or already cancelled orders cannot be cancelled again.
Order deposit must be paid through PayOS before the order proceeds to provider acceptance when deposit payment is required.
If a customer cancels before a provider accepts the order the platform applies a 100% deposit refund rate by default.
If a customer cancels within 30 minutes after provider acceptance the platform applies a 90% deposit refund rate by default.
If a customer cancels more than 30 minutes after provider acceptance the platform applies a 70% deposit refund rate by default.
Refund requests may only be submitted after the related order has been cancelled and require administrator approval before wallet credit is issued.
Only the assigned provider may accept start complete or update the status of an order assigned to them.
Provider verification documents must be reviewed and approved by an administrator before the provider is marked as verified.
Only the listing owner may create update or delete their own Pass đồ marketplace listing.
A paid Pass đồ listing fee is required before a priced listing becomes publicly visible when the computed listing fee is greater than zero.
Pass đồ listing fee is calculated as 2% of listing price with a minimum of 5000 VND and a maximum of 30000 VND for priced listings.
Only a buyer who has expressed interest in a listing may be selected by the seller to confirm a Pass đồ deal.
A seller may confirm a Pass đồ deal with only one buyer at a time and the listing status becomes reserved after deal confirmation.
A seller may cancel a confirmed Pass đồ deal only if the buyer has not yet marked transport as booked.
Only the confirmed buyer may book UniMove transport for a Pass đồ item after deal confirmation.
Pass đồ pickup location is fixed to the listing area and the buyer selects only the delivery address for transport booking.
A seller may bump their own listing to the top of browse results at most once every 24 hours.
Customers may rate a provider only after the related transport order is completed.
Customers may rate a Pass đồ seller only after confirming item receipt for the completed marketplace transaction.
Disputes and refund approvals must be reviewed and resolved by an administrator based on order evidence and platform policy.
Only administrators may force-cancel orders approve refunds verify providers and manage platform-wide settings.
All payment webhooks from PayOS must pass signature verification before payment or order status is updated.
Network transmissions involving authentication credentials payment data and personally identifiable information must use HTTPS and secure token-based access.
Provider withdrawal requests must be approved by an administrator before payout is processed.
Promotion codes must be valid active and within usage limits before being applied to an order payment.
System announcements and broadcast notifications may only be created and published by administrators.
